entries.openingLines: The village of Holcomb stands on the high wheat plains of western Kansas, a lonesome area that other Kansans call 'out there.'
entries.title: In Cold Blood
entries.author: Truman Capote

entries.openingLines: We were somewhere around Barstow on the edge of the desert when the drugs began to take hold.
entries.title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
entries.author: Hunter S. Thompson

entries.openingLines: On August 6, 1945, at fifteen minutes past eight in the morning, Japanese time, at the moment when the atomic bomb flashed above Hiroshima...
entries.title: Hiroshima
entries.author: John Hersey
